meta.title: I Generated 100 Monetizable YouTube Shorts With My AI Clone on AutoPilot
meta.description:
I Generated 100 Monetizable YouTube Shorts With My AI Clone on AutoPilot
Try Make https://www.make.com/en/register?promo=dankieft&utm_source=dankieft&utm_medium=influencer&utm_campaign=dankieft-ai-generated-videos-feb25

In this make.com tutorial I give you a step by step breakdown on how to clone yourself and fully automate it with AI. By using Make I made an automation that automatically converts a youtube video into a youtube short through Heygen. This YouTube short can either be directly uploaded on YouTube or it can be send to your drive so you can edit it further. 

Copy My checklist & Make file for Free
https://docs.google.com/document/d/1kSQv4fZ2tjDh5Gyz770mN5qNMPv6RUBsBJGImsA678U/edit?usp=drive_link

Thanks to Make for sponsoring this video. Our sponsors help us grow the channel and keep making better videos for you. Thanks for your support! 

👉My Ai Toolkit - https://dankieft.carrd.co/
My toolkit gives you over 30+ ai tools that I've gathered over the years and use daily. You'll also get access to my free newsletter that educates you about the latest ai tools.

📧 For business inquiries: business@dankieft.com
Follow me on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dan.kieft/
